description:
Software purpose-built for planning and building teams. All the tools you need to assess, compare, annotate and approve digital plans.


New
- Added insert text and replace text comment tools
- Added support for insert text comment selection highlighting
- Added "Set default properties" to comment property dialogs to allow setting default colour and opacity
Changes
- Changed to improve handling of large comment text
- Changed to improve selection of rotated comment text
- Changed default comment colours
Fixes
- Fixed a crash when the comments panel is shrunk to very thin
- Fixed a disabled post button after rectangle selecting to remove some angled comment characters
- Fixed an occasional deadlock in cloud management when logging is enabled
- Fixed changing comment properties not updating last modified time
- Fixed comment sizes not updating correctly in the panel when deleting comment replies
- Fixed incorrect angled comment intersection checks
- Fixed issues selecting non-angled comment text followed by angled text
- Fixed issues wrapping comment text with long lines with no spaces
- Fixed off-page comment highlighting drawing outside the image
- Fixed properties not setting back to default after cancelling or completing a new comment
- Fixed reading replace text comments ignoring opacity
- Fixed rectangle selecting to remove comment characters not undrawing some angled characters
- Fixed replace text comments reading a comment with a reply and not showing selection
- Fixed some angled reverse comment selections selecting more than one line of text
- Fixed some angled comment selections selecting extra characters
- Fixed "Unable to download content from the Trapeze Cloud" error
